title: Approve a safe refactor after checking the right evidence
objective: Review the pull request and decide whether it should be approved or rejected.

pull_request.title: Refactor formatter helpers and refresh inline docs
pull_request.author: devon
pull_request.description: This PR extracts duplicated formatting logic, renames a helper for clarity, and updates the usage notes. No product behavior should change.
pull_request.summary: A low-risk refactor touching formatting helpers and documentation. The intended outcome is approval after a quick but structured review.

changed_files.summary: Extracts duplicated string normalization into a shared normalize_currency_label() helper and updates all three call sites to use it. No behavioral change.
changed_files.diff:
@@ -1,42 +1,48 @@
 """Currency and number formatting utilities."""
 
 from decimal import Decimal
 from typing import Union
 
 Number = Union[int, float, Decimal]
 
 
-def format_currency(value: Number) -> str:
-    """Format a numeric value as a display currency string."""
-    normalized = str(value).strip()
-    return normalized.replace('USD', '$')
-
-
-def format_invoice_total(value: Number) -> str:
-    """Format the invoice total line item."""
-    normalized = str(value).strip()
-    return 'Total: ' + normalized.replace('USD', '$')
-
-
-def format_receipt_amount(value: Number) -> str:
-    """Format the receipt summary amount."""
-    normalized = str(value).strip()
-    return normalized.replace('USD', '$') + ' (paid)'
+def normalize_currency_label(value: Number) -> str:
+    """Normalize a numeric value to a display-ready currency string."""
+    normalized = str(value).strip()
+    return normalized.replace('USD', '$')
+
+
+def format_currency(value: Number) -> str:
+    """Format a numeric value as a display currency string."""
+    return normalize_currency_label(value)
+
+
+def format_invoice_total(value: Number) -> str:
+    """Format the invoice total line item."""
+    return 'Total: ' + normalize_currency_label(value)
+
+
+def format_receipt_amount(value: Number) -> str:
+    """Format the receipt summary amount."""
+    return normalize_currency_label(value) + ' (paid)'

changed_files.summary: Updates the formatter usage guide to document the new normalize_currency_label() helper and mark the old duplication pattern as deprecated.
changed_files.diff:
@@ -1,12 +1,18 @@
 # Formatter Utilities
 
-Call format_currency(value) directly.
-Duplicate normalization logic lives in format_invoice_total and
-format_receipt_amount.
+## Currency Formatting
+
+Call `format_currency(value)` to format any numeric value.
+Internally, all three formatters now share `normalize_currency_label()`.
+
+### normalize_currency_label(value)
+
+Low-level helper that strips whitespace and substitutes the USD symbol.
+Direct use is discouraged outside the formatting module.
+
 ## Linting
 
 Run `pylint src/formatting/` to verify no regressions.

policy_text: Approve refactors when tests pass and no blocker findings are present.
Avoid blocking comments for naming or style-only cleanups unless behavior changes.

findings.title: Documentation is consistent with the rename
findings.description: The docs update matches the helper rename and does not introduce risk.

static_analysis.summary: Static analysis completed successfully with no actionable findings.

test_results.summary: All 14 unit and lint checks passed.

ai_review.summary: AI reviewer found no regressions and recommends approval after confirming tests.
